description: A cybersecurity analyst must respond to an alert indicating a potential advanced persistent threat (APT) actor on a classified network.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the alert and analyze the associated network traffic data to confirm malicious activity.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst confirms the presence of anomalous traffic patterns consistent with an APT.

nodes.task_description: Identify the compromised host and quarantine it from the rest of the network to prevent lateral movement.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst successfully isolates the correct machine.

nodes.task_description: Initiate a forensic analysis of the quarantined host to identify the attacker's tools and techniques.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst begins the forensic process to understand the scope of the breach.
